brand_identity.communication_style: Like a senior engineer sharing a breakthrough methodology with a peer. Focuses on multiplying capabilities and building ecosystems rather than enforcing vendor lock-in.

ux_philosophy.information_density: Refined Minimalism. Clean, executive-level summaries default to view, with frictionless, obvious pathways to drill down into dense technical schematics, API docs, or raw telemetry.
ux_philosophy.emotional_resonance: Empowerment. Users should feel like they have a clear, well-lit perspective of the entire landscape, with the tools to dig deep when necessary.

backgrounds.description: Warm, bright off-whites that evoke a well-lit modern lab without feeling like a sterile hospital.

text.description: Deep slate and charcoal tones instead of harsh pure black to maintain contrast while softening the reading experience.

accents.description: A deep, trustworthy lab teal (primary) paired with a warm, energetic terracotta/amber (secondary) to inject warmth and vitality into the technical space.

hierarchy_rules.h1: Bold, spacious tracking, used for hero statements.
hierarchy_rules.h2: Semi-bold, acts as clear section dividers.
hierarchy_rules.body: Regular weight, optimized for high legibility in long-form reading.
hierarchy_rules.code_blocks: Slightly reduced font size, distinct background container for immediate visual separation.

borders.style: Subtle, 1px solid #E2E8F0 for definition without heaviness.
borders.description: Slightly rounded corners to make the highly technical content feel approachable and human-centric.

shadows.description: Soft, diffused drop shadows to gently lift elements off the warm lab background, establishing a clear Z-axis and hierarchy.

spacing.description: Generous macro-whitespace between sections to allow the user to breathe, with tighter micro-spacing within component groups to associate related data.
